verse_text: This is He of whom I said, 'After me comes a Man who is preferred before me, for He was before me.'

links.context: John the Baptist was imprisoned soon after Jesus was baptized ([[MRK.1:14]]). Though John directed his disciples to follow Christ ([[JOH.1:29]]-31, 35-37), some remained with him. While John's own faith was undoubtedly strengthened by the signs Christ performed, the Fathers universally see this encounter as a means John used to convince his remaining disciples that Jesus was indeed the Coming One.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
